member.name: T:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SagaNetBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder returned by . Use it to register workflows, custom middleware, and configure options.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SagaNetBuilder.AddWorkflow``2
member.summary: Registers a workflow definition. The workflow and its steps are resolved from the DI container, so you can inject dependencies into steps normally.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SagaNetBuilder.AddMiddleware``1
member.summary: Adds a custom middleware to the step execution pipeline.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SagaNetBuilder.Configure(System.Action{SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions})
member.summary: Configures the workflow engine options inline.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.WorkflowRegistration
member.summary: Marker used to delay workflow registration until after the DI container is built.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.WorkflowRegistration.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Marker used to delay workflow registration until after the DI container is built.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering SagaNet into an .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSagaNet(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.SagaNetBuilder})
member.summary: Adds the SagaNet workflow engine to the DI container.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSagaNetHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHealthChecksBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds SagaNet health checks: reports Healthy when the host is running.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Extensions.DependencyInjection.WorkflowHostHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that reports Healthy when the is running.
